action.reasoning: Observation: Train failed due to deprecated 'verbose' arg in ReduceLROnPlateau (PyTorch version mismatch) + truncated save dict in train.py (missing embed_size close). Best AUC still 0.7548 (val peaks ~0.759). Analysis: Code bug wasted iter; embedded DKT architecture solid but needs stable training with proper ES/scheduler to stop at peak val AUC for better test gen. Higher capacity (h=768) + tuned reg helped val before. Decision: Rewrite full clean train.py (fix scheduler, complete save with all hparams, add ES logic, log only metrics+key prints), use balanced params h=768/l=2/e=96/d=0.45/lr=4e-4/wd=1e-5/epochs=35/sch-pat=4/es-pat=12; run training then submit_eval on best_model.pt to get improved score + measure time (~80s).
